title: Sarepta Therapeutics Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights - Record Revenue Growth
text:
Sarepta Therapeutics Inc reported record Q4 2024 earnings with significant revenue growth driven primarily by ELEVIDYS sales. The company surpassed Wall Street expectations with total revenue reaching $658.4 million, exceeding the anticipated $589.45 million.

Key Financial Performance: Q4 2024 net product revenues: $638 million, a 75% increase over the same quarter the previous year. Full-year 2024 revenue: $1.8 billion, up 56% year-over-year on both a GAAP and non-GAAP basis.

ELEVIDYS Sales Milestone: Fourth-quarter ELEVIDYS sales: $384 million, representing a 112% increase over the prior sequential quarter. Full-year ELEVIDYS sales exceeded $1 billion since initial approval in June 2023. The company announced that ELEVIDYS had the most successful gene therapy launch in history.

2025 Guidance and Outlook: The company's 2025 net product revenue guidance is $2.9 billion to $3.1 billion, which represents approximately 70% growth over 2024. ELEVIDYS specifically expected to grow over 160% year-over-year. Approximately two-thirds of 2025 revenue expected from ELEVIDYS, one-third from PMO franchise.

Market Penetration: Current treatment penetration at approximately 5% of on-label addressable patient population, suggesting significant runway for continued growth. Management expressed confidence in meeting guidance based on strong execution and understanding of patient treatment cadence.

Profitability Status: Company achieved sustainable profitability and positive cash flow, supporting further investments in pipeline and commercial infrastructure.
